data.text:
I'm on the lookout for a passionate and talented Machine Learning Engineer. 

This is a chance to contribute to the next generation of personalization algorithms, using cutting-edge machine learning techniques to understand and enhance long term member value. 

If you have a experience with AI/ML personalization systems at scale, have worked on Rewards Models in Reinforcement Learning applications or come with a strong background in Machine Learning and Software Engineering, we would love to hear from you!

resharedPost.text:
Rebellion’s own Joseph Durago and Briar Doty participated in the fourth Bravo 11 Hackathon, with Briar’s team landing a 1st place win. 

“It was an honor to present our prototype to the event’s distinguished visitors and pressure-test our solution with those who could benefit from our technology in the field,” said Joe, an Applied Research Engineer on the Rebellion Iris product team. “But the real privilege was the opportunity to contribute to saving future lives by deterring conflict and protecting our nation’s service members.”

Read about Joe and Briar's experience on our blog ↘

https://hubs.ly/Q02p7LDk0

#SoftwareDefinedDefense #NationalSecurity #DefenseTech #Hackathon #AI

article.title: Rebellion engineer takes first place in BRAVO 11 Hackathon category

data.text:
I’m happy to share that I’m starting a new position as Director of Engineering (Ranking) at Toss!

I am profoundly grateful for my time at Meta and the privilege of working alongside such an amazingly talented group of engineers. Though I already miss you all, I will carry the learnings with me proudly.

This new role takes me back to my home city of Seoul after decades. The transition marks a major professional and personal milestone. 

Toss has been at the forefront of the Korean fintech revolution and is scaling up its e-commerce business as a super app. Personalization will be a key play and I am thrilled to lead the team that will build the foundation for this growth!
